title: 24Pcs Harmonica for Kids, Lightweight Cartoon Harmonicas with Double Row of 16 Holes, Harmonicas for Toddler, Kids, Adult Beginners' Musical Instrument Toy Present (Over 3 Years Old)
features: Harmonica for Kids' Hands: The Harmonica is 5.1 inch length, 1.1 inch width, 0.8 inch thickness, made of plastic and metal, lightweight, suitable for kids over 3 years old with small hands grip.

Early Childhood Education: Upgraded 16 hole kids harmonica can cultivate children's interest in music, improve the sound sense, and at the same time, playing an instrument can develop children's left brain.

Perfect Present: Can be used as birthday parties' present and holiday present, 12 styles harmonica meet the needs of the family to play together at family gatherings and strengthen the parent-child relationship.
Beautiful Memories: This harmonica will allow your kids to have a wonderful memory in childhood, which is not only the inheritance of music, but also the continuation of family affection.
Multiple Uses: Suitable for family day, birthday party game, stage performances, classroom teaching, not only the harmonica suit for kids beginners, but also suit for adult beginners.
